pages.raw_text:
There may yet be compromise
In the commission that is drafting
a new city charter on the length of
the term of office of the commits
sioners.


The commission is divided as to
how long the commissioners should
serve, some wanting the term four
years and others only two years,
for which term the mayor is at
present chosen.


The basis of compromise pro-
posed Is that the advocates of a
shorter term concede to the longer
term provided the commission
adopts plan of recall providing
for a recall election on petition
signed by 10 per cent of the voters.
1t is proposed to require that when
a recall petition is started it shall
be filed with the city clerk, where
1t can be signed by the voters. This
will do away with dark lantern re-
call methods and give the recall
the publicity that general public
business receives.
